---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ""
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g. "I wish I could export to PDF...")

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Provider context

If this feature is specific to a provider, mention which one:
- [ ] Google Antigravity
- [ ] ChatGPT
- [ ] Claude
- [ ] Gemini
- [ ] Open WebUI
- [ ] Ollama
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or mockups about the feature request.
